title: Real Nether
description: You'll burn in the Nether without protection.
body:
# Intro
Have you ever thought that the Nether was a little too, what's the word?  *Cold* ?\
Well, never fear!  The **Real Nether** is here!

### Supplementary Material

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

| Item | Crafting Block | Recipe |
|:-:|:-:|:-:|
| Ice Machine | Crafting Table | ![Ice Machine Recipe.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/flBaUYpY/images/1e4dae1b63b694bf54a4072c2ff4cd3dd3c31c44.png) |
| Ice | Ice Machine | ![Ice Recipe.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/flBaUYpY/images/5cc8cf541bae2e52037996a2984af28169fea7d4.png) |
| Packed Ice | Ice Machine | *Packed Ice Recipe.png* (same as Vanilla Crafting Table)|
| Blue Ice | Ice Machine | *Blue Ice Recipe.png* (same as Vanilla Crafting Table)|
| Icy Soul | Ice Machine | ![Icy Soul Recipe.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/flBaUYpY/images/388ee8e27b197b48511cad2d8e029d571f4f0f94.png) |
| Frozen Spirit | Ice Machine | ![Frozen Spirit Recipe.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/flBaUYpY/images/c8d9f6691212cbec5af5c1f2034641f3e06ee742.png) |
| Glaciated Wraith | Ice Machine | ![Glaciated Wraith Recipe.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/flBaUYpY/images/a1551d3d03dca990ac4bb91d2991132ffa066fb8.png) |
| Netherite Smithtable | Crafting Table | ![Netherite Smithtable Recipe.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/flBaUYpY/images/76bcd063d1b3a4ff70e22f4e04e33ecfb8622ac1.png) |
| Netherite Items | Netherite Smithtable | ![Netherite Items Recipes.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/flBaUYpY/images/7e2b132199a47ec5151e4bfe6438e41e20a313c9.gif) |

</details>

<details>
<summary>Walkthrough</summary>
  
>_0a) Collect Ice Shards from Ice_
> 
>_0b) Collect Ice, Packed Ice, and/or Blue Ice_

    
**1)** Use 6 Cobblestone, 1 Cobblestone Slab, 1 Smooth Stone Slab, and 1 Hopper (recipe in gallery) to craft Ice Machine

>_1a) Craft Ice from Ice Shards in the Ice Machine  (see recipes)_

    
**2)** Use the Ice Machine to craft Icy Totems  _(see recipes)_

>_2a) Tier 1 - 6 Ice, 3 Gold Ingot_
> 
>_2b) Tier 2 - 6 Packed Ice, 3 Diamond_
> 
>_2c) Tier 3 - 6 Blue Ice, 2 Soul Lantern, 1 Netherite [Alloy] Ingot_


**3)** Go to the Nether to acquire Black Stone & Ancient Debris


**4)** Use Black Stone to create Netherite Forge (Diagram from back to front)

```
    ▓ - air
    ░ - any
    ■ - Polished Blackstone Bricks
    ╚ ═ ╝ - Polished Blackstone Brick Stairs
    ◘ - Chiseled Polished Blackstone (placed very last)
```


```
         0              1               2              3              4
    ░░ ■ ■ ■ ░░    ■ ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ■     ■ ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ■     ■ ▓▓▓▓▓ ■     ░░ ■ ■ ■ ░░
    ░░ ■ ■ ■ ░░    ■ ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ■     ■ ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ■     ■ ■ ■ ■ ■     ░░ ╚ ═ ╝ ░░
    ░░ ■ ■ ■ ░░    ■ ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ■     ■ ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓ ■     ■ ■ ■ ■ ■     ░░ ■ ◘ ■ ░░
    ░░░░░░░░░░░   ░░░ ■ ■ ■ ░░░   ░░░ ■ ■ ■ ░░░   ░░ ■ ■ ■ ░░    ░░░░░░░░░░░
    
```
>_4a) Use Lava to power your Forge (1 Lava smelts 100 items)_

    
**5)** Use your forge to smelt Ancient Debris to Scrap then Nuggets


**6)** Use 4 Polished Blackstone Bricks, 3 Netherite Scrap, 1 Campfire, and 1 Smithing Table to craft Netherite Smithtable  _(see recipes)_

>_6a) Use Netherite Smithtable to craft non-alloy Netherite items  (see recipes)_

    
**7)** Equip your Netherite Armor to protect yourself in the Nether

>_7a) These also lessen burning: Powdered Snow, Fire Resistance, Fire Protection_
</details>

### Summary
This data pack assumes that the Nether is spicy hot!

Real Nether is a data pack which aims to make the Nether a little harder while also providing a new twist to the way that Netherite works, and new ways to traverse the Nether.

The vanilla Netherite has been replaced with Netherite Alloy.  Use a Netherite Forge to get *real* Netherite.

# Function

Going into the Nether **without** one of these will cause you to combust:
- Full Netherite Armor _(not Netherite Alloy)_
- Ice Totem _(in off-hand)_
    - Icy Soul
    - Frozen Spirit
    - Glaciated Wraith
- Fire Resistance
- Inside Powdered Snow

### _¡ New Features !_
**-- The Netherite Forge!**\
     _(a new player-made structure)_

The Netherite Forge is made from polished blackstone _(which is acquired in the Nether)_, and is used to smelt Ancient Debris and Netherite Scrap, producing Netherite Scrap and Netherite Nuggets respectively.

**-- The Ice Machine**

The Ice Machine is used to make Ice _(from Ice Shards)_, Ice Totems, and Packed/Blue ice.

**-- The Netherite Smithtable**

The Netherite Smithtable is used to create Netherite Items, such as: Ingots, Swords, Pickaxes, Armor, etc. . .



Have an issue or suggestion?  Click here: https://forms.gle/DzwTNuuRfbimWPu36
